example.target: Na minha opinião, o novo horário é melhor para todos.
example.gloss: In my opinion, the new schedule is better for everyone.

example.target: Do meu ponto de vista, esta proposta faz todo o sentido.
example.gloss: From my point of view, this proposal makes complete sense.

example.target: Ele apresentou um argumento muito forte durante o debate.
example.gloss: He presented a very strong argument during the debate.

example.target: Nunca me explicaste a razão da tua decisão.
example.gloss: You never explained to me the reason for your decision.

words.note: ter a certeza = to be sure

example.target: Tens a certeza de que a reunião é amanhã?
example.gloss: Are you sure the meeting is tomorrow?

example.target: A grande vantagem de viver no centro é poder ir a pé para o trabalho.
example.gloss: The big advantage of living in the centre is being able to walk to work.

example.target: A única desvantagem desta casa é ficar longe da estação.
example.gloss: The only disadvantage of this house is that it is far from the station.

example.target: O debate sobre o ambiente durou mais de duas horas.
example.gloss: The debate about the environment lasted more than two hours.

example.target: Tivemos uma discussão interessante sobre política ao jantar.
example.gloss: We had an interesting discussion about politics at dinner.

example.target: Ela aceitou a crítica sem se zangar.
example.gloss: She accepted the criticism without getting angry.

example.target: O professor fez um elogio ao trabalho dela.
example.gloss: The teacher paid a compliment to her work.

example.target: Dou-te uma sugestão: fala com ele antes de decidires.
example.gloss: I'll give you a suggestion: talk to him before you decide.

example.target: A proposta foi aceite por todos os colegas.
example.gloss: The proposal was accepted by all the colleagues.

example.target: Segui o conselho da minha avó e correu tudo bem.
example.gloss: I followed my grandmother's advice and everything went well.

example.target: Há um desacordo entre os vizinhos por causa do barulho.
example.gloss: There is a disagreement between the neighbours because of the noise.

example.target: Devemos combater os preconceitos com informação.
example.gloss: We should fight prejudices with information.

example.target: A decisão do governo gerou uma grande polémica.
example.gloss: The government's decision caused a big controversy.

example.target: Cheguei à conclusão de que é melhor esperar.
example.gloss: I came to the conclusion that it is better to wait.

example.target: Ela defendeu a sua ideia com muita convicção.
example.gloss: She defended her idea with great conviction.

example.target: Não critiques o plano sem apresentares uma alternativa.
example.gloss: Don't criticise the plan without presenting an alternative.

example.target: Os pais apoiaram a decisão da filha.
example.gloss: The parents supported their daughter's decision.

example.target: O presidente opôs-se à construção do novo centro comercial.
example.gloss: The mayor opposed the construction of the new shopping centre.

example.target: Não me vais convencer com esses argumentos.
example.gloss: You are not going to convince me with those arguments.

example.target: Ele tentou persuadir-me a mudar de emprego.
example.gloss: He tried to persuade me to change jobs.

example.target: Tens de admitir que eu tinha razão.
example.gloss: You have to admit that I was right.

example.target: O ministro negou as acusações na televisão.
example.gloss: The minister denied the accusations on television.

example.target: A diretora afirmou que o projeto continuará no próximo ano.
example.gloss: The director stated that the project will continue next year.

example.target: Sugiro que falemos primeiro com o responsável.
example.gloss: I suggest we speak with the person in charge first.

example.target: Proponho que adiemos a reunião para sexta-feira.
example.gloss: I propose that we postpone the meeting to Friday.

example.target: Recomendo-te este livro; li-o num fim de semana.
example.gloss: I recommend this book to you; I read it in one weekend.

example.target: Ela insistiu em pagar o jantar, embora eu não quisesse.
example.gloss: She insisted on paying for dinner, even though I didn't want her to.

example.target: O médico salientou a importância de dormir bem.
example.gloss: The doctor stressed the importance of sleeping well.

example.target: No relatório, ele refere vários estudos recentes.
example.gloss: In the report, he mentions several recent studies.

example.target: Considero esta proposta a mais realista de todas.
example.gloss: I consider this proposal the most realistic of all.

example.target: Suponho que ele já saiba a notícia.
example.gloss: I suppose he already knows the news.

example.target: Duvido que eles cheguem a horas com este trânsito.
example.gloss: I doubt they will arrive on time with this traffic.

example.target: O cliente reclamou porque a sopa chegou fria.
example.gloss: The customer complained because the soup arrived cold.

example.target: A chefe elogiou-o à frente de toda a equipa.
example.gloss: The boss praised him in front of the whole team.

example.target: Não exageres, o filme não foi assim tão mau.
example.gloss: Don't exaggerate, the film wasn't that bad.

example.target: Ele tentou justificar o atraso com o trânsito.
example.gloss: He tried to justify the delay with the traffic.

example.target: Ela não gosta que a contradigam em público.
example.gloss: She doesn't like being contradicted in public.

example.target: Depois de ouvir os dois lados, concluí que ambos tinham razão em parte.
example.gloss: After hearing both sides, I concluded that both were partly right.

example.target: O teu argumento é convincente, mas quero pensar melhor.
example.gloss: Your argument is convincing, but I want to think it over.

example.target: Afinal, tinhas razão: o restaurante estava fechado.
example.gloss: After all, you were right: the restaurant was closed.

words.en: to agree, to be in agreement

example.target: Estou de acordo contigo em quase tudo.
example.gloss: I agree with you on almost everything.

example.target: Se mudares de ideias, liga-me.
example.gloss: If you change your mind, call me.

example.target: Depois de muita conversa, chegámos finalmente a acordo.
example.gloss: After a lot of talking, we finally reached an agreement.

example.target: Por um lado, gostava de viajar; por outro, prefiro poupar.
example.gloss: On the one hand, I'd like to travel; on the other, I prefer to save money.

example.target: O trabalho é cansativo; por outro lado, paga bem.
example.gloss: The job is tiring; on the other hand, it pays well.

example.target: Queria ir à festa; no entanto, tive de ficar a trabalhar.
example.gloss: I wanted to go to the party; however, I had to stay working.

words.note: pt-PT keeps the c in facto

example.target: De facto, tens toda a razão.
example.gloss: Indeed, you are completely right.

example.target: Quanto a mim, o assunto está encerrado.
example.gloss: As far as I'm concerned, the matter is closed.

example.target: Embora seja caro, este curso vale a pena.
example.gloss: Although it is expensive, this course is worth it.

example.target: O hotel era bonito; contudo, o serviço deixou muito a desejar.
example.gloss: The hotel was beautiful; however, the service left much to be desired.

example.target: Tenho tantas saudades da comida da minha mãe!
example.gloss: I miss my mother's cooking so much!

example.target: Ela fala dos filhos com muito orgulho.
example.gloss: She speaks about her children with great pride.

example.target: Tive vergonha de pedir ajuda, mas devia ter pedido.
example.gloss: I was embarrassed to ask for help, but I should have asked.

example.target: Confesso que tenho um bocadinho de inveja das tuas férias.
example.gloss: I confess I'm a little bit envious of your holidays.

example.target: Ele tem ciúmes do sucesso do irmão.
example.gloss: He is jealous of his brother's success.

example.target: Fiquei cheio de raiva quando vi o carro riscado.
example.gloss: I was filled with anger when I saw the car scratched.

example.target: Tenho medo de que seja tarde demais.
example.gloss: I'm afraid it may be too late.

example.target: Não percas a esperança; tudo se resolve.
example.gloss: Don't lose hope; everything works out.

example.target: Que alívio, afinal encontrei as chaves!
example.gloss: What a relief, I found the keys after all!

example.target: O concerto foi uma desilusão; esperava muito mais.
example.gloss: The concert was a disappointment; I was expecting much more.

example.target: Para minha surpresa, ele pediu desculpa a todos os colegas.
example.gloss: To my surprise, he apologised to all his colleagues.

example.target: É preciso tempo para ganhar a confiança de alguém.
example.gloss: It takes time to earn someone's trust.

example.target: Ele olhou para o desconhecido com desconfiança.
example.gloss: He looked at the stranger with distrust.

example.target: Sinto algum arrependimento por não ter estudado línguas.
example.gloss: I feel some regret for not having studied languages.

example.target: Quero expressar a minha gratidão a todos os que me ajudaram.
example.gloss: I want to express my gratitude to everyone who helped me.

example.target: Antes dos exames, ela sente sempre muita ansiedade.
example.gloss: Before exams, she always feels a lot of anxiety.

example.target: Ela trata os netos com muita ternura.
example.gloss: She treats her grandchildren with great tenderness.

example.target: Guardo com carinho as cartas que me escreveste.
example.gloss: I keep the letters you wrote me with affection.

example.target: Falou da infância com alguma mágoa na voz.
example.gloss: He spoke about his childhood with some sorrow in his voice.

example.target: Apaixonou-se por Lisboa à primeira vista.
example.gloss: He fell in love with Lisbon at first sight.

example.target: Arrependi-me de não ter dito a verdade logo no início.
example.gloss: I regretted not having told the truth right at the start.

example.target: Assustei-me com o barulho da trovoada.
example.gloss: I got scared by the noise of the thunderstorm.

words.en: to be ashamed, to be embarrassed

example.target: Envergonhou-se de ter chegado tão atrasado à cerimónia.
example.gloss: He was embarrassed to have arrived so late to the ceremony.

words.en: to be moved, to be touched

example.target: A avó comoveu-se ao ver as fotografias antigas.
example.gloss: Grandma was moved when she saw the old photographs.

words.en: to vent, to get something off one's chest

example.target: Precisava de desabafar com alguém, por isso liguei-te.
example.gloss: I needed to vent to someone, that's why I called you.

example.target: Sinto falta das nossas conversas ao fim da tarde.
example.gloss: I miss our late-afternoon conversations.

example.target: Estou farto de esperar; vou-me embora.
example.gloss: I'm fed up with waiting; I'm leaving.

example.target: Dou-me bem com todos os colegas do escritório.
example.gloss: I get along well with all my office colleagues.

example.target: Ele dá-se mal com o cunhado desde o casamento.
example.gloss: He hasn't got along with his brother-in-law since the wedding.

example.target: Fiquei aliviado quando soube que estavam todos bem.
example.gloss: I was relieved when I learned that everyone was fine.

example.target: Fiquei dececionado com o resultado do jogo.
example.gloss: I was disappointed with the result of the match.
